titleStmt.title: SII 38.229: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 229. (A.R. No. 229 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the same shrine of the above temple.

summary.p: Beginning of the lines is built in and the record is incomplete.

It records that the peruṅguṟi mahāsabhā of Punnaivāyil alias Rājanārāyaṇachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puḻal-nāḍu in Rājēndrasōḻa-valanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam sold by auction four thousand kuḻi of land in three plots (?) (which was equivalent to) two vēli to several tapasyar (holy persons), Dāmaṟ kiḻavan Ambalavan Śiṟuttoṇḍaṉ, Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Eḍuttapādam of Kuttāṉūr in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu in Rājēndrasōḻa-valanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam and other mendicants. The land was also freed from taxes, silliṟai, echchōṟu, kūṟṟu-nel, and other taxes.
The record was written down on the orders of the members of the above sabhā, Śandayaḍik kṛamavittaṉ, Kumiṇḍali udaiyāditta kṛamavittaṉ and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nattu tancakkaranaṭātti vīrasiṁhāsanattu puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya cakravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭup puḻalnāṭṭu punnaivāyilāna rājanārāya
nāṭṭu tirumāl tāmaṟkiḻavan Ampalavan ciṟuttoṇṭaṉum coḻamaṇṭalattu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭuk kūttaṉūr(ṟa) kūttaṉūrāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāneṭuttapātamu muḷḷiṭṭa tapasyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur piṭākai cekkāṭṭur kuntavai vatikkuk kiḻakku parān=takavāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟ
m maṇalyellaikkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nattamum turavu muṭpaṭṭa kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattu Eṇṇūṟṟaimpatum Itukellai cirimātevivatikkuk kiḻakku 1 kaṇṇāṟukaḷil Uṭaiya Etirilicoḻan tenvarampukarai tittatukku vaṭakkum maṇaellaikku teṟkum kuḻi Eḻu nūṟṟeṇpattu munṟum Ākak kuḻi nālāyirattināl nilam Iruveliyum Iṟai
vaṟku viṟṟukkuṭuttom muṟcollappaṭṭa rājanārāyaṇacaturvedimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟimahāsabhaiyom Oru kālāvatum Iru kālāvatu mukkālavatu yār Eṭuttapātam Āṭiyaruḷa muṟṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaiccelak koṇṭom Iruveliyum piṟcollappaṭṭa kūttanūruṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāneṭuttapātamum tāmaṟkiḻavan Ampala
*śvara vilaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaikāṭṭa peṟātākavum col kuṟṟameḻuttup piḻai Iṉṉilattiṟku Ivvūr Eri nikkiyaṉ pāccikoḷ ccilliṟai coṟumāṭṭu Eccoṟṟuk kūṟṟunel nir
m tāmaṟ kiḻavan Ampalavanciṟuttoṇṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa tapasyaṟku muṟcollappaṭṭa rājanārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi sabhaiyuḷ tār paṇiyālum kumiṇṭali cantayaṭikkiramavittaṉ paṇiyālum kumiṇṭali Utaiyātittakkiramavittar paṇiyālum vaṭṭamaṇit
ttuIncomplete and built in.
Digital edition of SII 38.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
